holdings.infoBox: SSUS is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Strategy Shares Day Hagan Smart Sector ETF (SSUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed US fund-of-funds that overweights and underweights 11 US large-cap sectors based on proprietary risk model. SSUS was launched on Jan 17, 2020 and is issued by Day Hagan.
